subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Lord of Might unto him who hath turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon and hath attained unto this Cause whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الجبروت لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و فاز بهذا الامر الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
